message:
feat(web): add Core Web Vitals performance monitoring

Implement comprehensive performance monitoring with Core Web Vitals:
- Add web-vitals package for LCP, CLS, INP, FCP, TTFB tracking
- Create lib/performance/web-vitals.ts with metric collection
- Add /api/vitals endpoint for aggregated metric storage
- Integrate with AnalyticsProvider for automatic initialization

Metrics are sent to:
- GA4 (if configured)
- Vercel Analytics (if available)
- Custom /api/vitals endpoint

Respects user privacy preferences (DNT, GPC, cookie consent).

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-xd0s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
